children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: The Director of National Intelligence shall establish in the intelligence community an element with the function of connecting the elements of the intelligence community engaged in the acquisition, storage, translation, or analysis of voice or data in digital form.

children.heading: Designation
children.label: b Designation
children.text: The element established under subsection (a) shall be known as the National Virtual Translation Center.
the integration of the translation capabilities of the intelligence community;
the use of remote-connection capabilities; and
the use of such other capabilities as the Director considers appropriate.
The Director shall retain direct supervision and control over the element established under subsection (a).

The element established under subsection (a) shall connect elements of the intelligence community utilizing the most current available information technology that is applicable to the function of the element.

children.label: A
children.text: has been certified as a secure facility by a department or agency of the United States Government; or

children.label: B
children.text: the Director has otherwise determined to be appropriate for such duties and functions.

children.heading: Deadline for establishment
children.label: e Deadline for establishment
children.text: The element required by subsection (a) shall be established as soon as practicable after , but not later than 90 days after .November 27, 2002November 27, 2002
